title: Game Girlfriend of Steel Disc Bonus
display_title: Game Girlfriend of Steel Disc Bonus
wikitext:
[]: [Game] Girlfriend of Steel Disc Bonus             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Aug 10, 2015 7:06 pm I'm unsure if you guys noticed or not seeing how it's over a decade old and I've only been here about a year, so I think I'll bring it up. That said, after I played the game recently, I checked around the disc to see if there was anything, and there was. Scans of the manual could be found and also a folder of images and some artwork. Below is a few examples but there are much more, so check them out if you like. I'll drop the DL link for them below. http://www.mediafire.com/download/5e5ydndfw8xzqpp/GOS1_Bonus.7z Pics SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Aug 10, 2015 9:38 pm So GFOS takes place in the Manga continuity?

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Aug 11, 2015 6:20 am Ray wrote: So GFOS takes place in the Manga continuity?

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Aug 11, 2015 8:42 am Those pictures are new to me, nice find.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Aug 11, 2015 1:34 pm xPearse wrote: How did you make that conclusion?

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Aug 11, 2015 1:49 pm Ray wrote: Shinji has brown eyes in this pics

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Wed Aug 12, 2015 2:40 am Ray wrote: Shinji has brown eyes in this pics

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 12, 2015 9:54 am Seeing the pics bonus folder takes me back to 2006-ish of playing the game! Heh, I still have my installation notes for that & GoS2 to help folks. If I remember correctly, couldn't GoS take place around Episode 13-ish, especially due to some of the Special Edition content? (Like mentioning the Primbow (sp) Box...)

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Aug 12, 2015 3:45 pm Thanks for posting this. I recognize some of the artwork from the Iron Maiden Story Book below, but there are a few, e.g. the ones with the TRIDENT, that are not in it.

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Thu Aug 13, 2015 2:31 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Seeing the pics bonus folder takes me back to 2006-ish of playing the game! Heh, I still have my installation notes for that & GoS2 to help folks. If I remember correctly, couldn't GoS take place around Episode 13-ish, especially due to some of the Special Edition content? (Like mentioning the Primbow (sp) Box...)
